title: Signage Designer| Kaki Bukit
description:
Key Responsibilities:

  • Interpret Design Briefs: Collaborate with salespersons and clients to fully understand their vision and needs. Develop and refine artwork concepts that align with their requirements.
  • Create Artwork: Utilize industry-leading design software (such as Adobe Illustrator, AutoCAD, CorelDraw) to craft detailed signage shop drawings and structures.
  • Prepare and Finalize Artwork: Ensure artwork is prepared to the highest standards for production and printing.
  • Coordinate Production: Work closely with the production team to ensure that the final product matches the artwork specifications.
  • Conduct Quality Checks: Oversee the production process and perform thorough quality checks on final products to ensure they meet client specifications and expectations.
  • Manage Projects: Juggle multiple projects effectively while meeting deadlines, ensuring top-notch design quality and precision.
  • Collaborate with Teams: Engage with marketing, sales, and product development teams to maintain a unified brand message and ensure cohesive design integration.
  • Incorporate Feedback: Be responsive to feedback and revisions to refine and perfect designs, meeting or exceeding client expectations.

Job Requirements:

  • Educational Background: A recognized diploma or degree in Graphic Design is preferred and will be considered advantageous.
  • Experience: Proven experience as a Graphic Designer in the signage industry is highly desirable.
  • Technical Skills: Proficiency in key design software such as Adobe Illustrator, Adobe Photoshop, AutoCAD, Flexi, and CorelDraw.
  • Communication & Collaboration: Excellent communication skills and the ability to work effectively within a team environment.
  • Attention to Detail: Strong attention to detail with the ability to deliver high-quality work under tight deadlines.
  • Creativity & Problem-Solving: Demonstrated creative thinking and problem-solving skills to develop innovative design solutions.

postedCompany.description:
LED SIGNS PTE LTD is a leading advertising display enterprise in Singapore. We have our fabrication factory locate at Singapore, China and Myanmar, which integrated with R&D, production, installation and maintenance.

Our constant pursuit is to continuously provide customers with satisfactory and practical advertising display products. Our products has been used in various government agencies, shopping malls, airports, university, hotels and etc.

Our belief is that business relationship is built based on honesty and trust.  Through transparent and effective  communication, we look forward to serve our customers and stakeholders in the best of their interests.
postedCompany.name: LED SIGNS PTE. LTD.
